title: rungia longifolia var. anamalayana
intro: Rungia longifolia var. anamalayana, also known as the Anamalai Rungia, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rungia longifolia var. anamalayana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as boils and ulcers. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
